3198730.name: 3°C Demo
3198730.description:
Basic Rules:

Connect and click on as many same-colored pieces as possible.
When there are 3 or more connected pieces, you score points equal to (number of connected pieces - 2) squared.
When you run out of clicks, new pieces will drop from above.
The game ends if the screen fills up with pieces.
3198730.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 土耳其语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 波兰语, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
